PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, JEFFREY LEE, SUZANNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSHETS, ALEX $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,140.00, PLTF. JEFFREY LEE RECOVERS $3,500.00 AND PLAINTIFF SUZANNE LEE RECOVERS $2,500.00 FROM DEFENDANT ALEX ROSHETS. STATUTORY COST ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS JEFFREY AND SUZANNE LEE.
ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, TOWNSEND, LAWRENCE GRIFFITH (088184), ARB-5 MAILED
